title: Season Summary
description: Structured data extracted from DM season summary blocks (regional changes, faction actions, economics, environment).

source_turn.description: Turn ID where this season summary block was found.

year.description: The in-game year this summary covers.

sections.description: Parsed sections from the season summary block.

regional_changes.description: Weather patterns, resource availability, regional developments.

faction_actions.description: What each faction did during the season.

environmental_notes.description: Unusual phenomena, crop conditions, environmental changes.

raw_text.description: The full text of the season summary block (truncated if very long).
